llm_advice.rationale: Baseline is purely ATen, bottleneck is multiple kernel launches. Fuse the rank-16 path (B.T@X and A@result) into a single custom kernel to reduce launch overhead and improve memory locality. Start with vectorized float4 version, fall back to scalar, then tune block size.
stop_conditions: speedup >= 1.2 on all benchmarked d values

notes: Use ATen/cuBLAS for the d x d GEMM.
Explore kernels that fuse Y += A @ T for rank 16.
